haiku45.summary_excerpt: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Critical issues: (1) Workflow references `tests/test-aggregator.ps1` and fixture files that don't exist—act would fail immediately. (2) Actions not pinned to SHA (v4→40-char SHA), violating GH Actions security best practices. (3) run-act-tests.ps1 test expectations (lines 56-58: 'Tests Passed', 'Failed: 0') don't match actual workflow output—tests will fail or be fragile. (4) Missing Set-StrictMode in scripts; Parse-JunitXml/Parse-JsonTestResults lac

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent PowerShell implementation with robust XML/JSON parsing and flaky test detection. YAML is clean and uses `shell: pwsh` correctly. Note: `run-act-tests.ps1` fails to create isolated temp repos/fixtures for different test cases as requested, instead re-running the same workflow 3 times.
